summary: Round 2 fixes: removed double-noise bug (offline+collator), fixed DPO data format, honest baseline names, proxy eval labels, robust tag parsing, FORCE_RERUN with marker cleanup, callable 27B stage, full schedule coverage in analysis, 27 unit tests.
fixes_applied_round2: train_nacpo.py: removed redundant offline noise injection — only online NoisyCurriculumCollator is used now (was double-noising)
train_nacpo.py: fixed DPO data formatting — chosen/rejected now contain only assistant messages, prompt is separate
run_nacpo_sweep.sh: renamed 'SimPO' baseline to 'dpo_high_beta' (was just DPO with beta=0.3, not actual SimPO)
run_nacpo_sweep.sh: IPO baseline verified correct (uses --loss_type ipo), label_smoothing verified correct (uses TRL native param)
run_nacpo_sweep.sh: rewrote phase-3 tag parsing with Python-based structured output — handles multi-word noise types correctly
eval_alignment.py: renamed eval functions to *_proxy suffix with detailed docstrings explaining proxy vs official benchmarks
eval_alignment.py: added module-level docstring documenting all three benchmarks as proxy implementations
run_all_experiments.sh: added --stage N argument for running individual stages (e.g., --stage 5 for 27B)
run_all_experiments.sh: FORCE_RERUN=1 now deletes phase markers before running
run_all_experiments.sh: Stage 5 now actually trains 27B model using best config from ranking
run_noise_analysis.py: added cosine and cyclic schedules to both accuracy analysis and schedule effects computation
tests/test_nacpo.py: added 27 unit tests covering all 6 schedule types, 3 injector types, collator behavior, and DPO data formatting
remaining_items: Full sweep run on GPU cluster
Replace proxy evaluations with official benchmark runners for camera-ready results
